```{r }
methylationData.3.QC.mRNA %>% filter(Name == "XM_043152787.1")  %>%
  ggplot(aes( x = start, y = percent, color = Tissue)) + geom_point(size = 0.3, aplpha = 0.5) +
  geom_smooth()



kruskal_results.mRNA.sig %>% slice_head(n = 5)  -> 
  top5.mRNA

methylationData.3.QC.mRNA   %>% 
  filter(Name %in%  top5.mRNA$Name) %>%
  mutate(Name = factor(Name, levels = top5.mRNA$Name)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = start, y = percent, color = Tissue)) +
  geom_point( size = 0.5, alpha = 0.4) + geom_smooth(se = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors) + ylim( c(0,100)) +
  labs(
    title = "Methylation across different TEs (top 5 significant)",
    x = "Position",
    y = "Percent methylated"
  ) + facet_wrap("Name", scales = "free_x")   +
  theme_light() -> examples.methylation
  

methylationData.3.QC.TE %>% 
  filter(TE_ID2 %in%  top5.te$TE_ID2) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = start, y = depth, color = Tissue)) +
  geom_point( size = 0.5, alpha = 0.4) + geom_smooth(se = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors) + ylim( c(0,40))  +
  labs(
    title = "Depth across different TEs (top 5 significant)",
    x = "Position in TE",
    y = "Depth"
  ) + facet_wrap(c("TE_ID2","TEclass"),nrow = 1, scales = "free_x")   +
  theme_light()  -> examples.depth



```


### mRNA methylation levels

```{r }
methylationData.3.QC.mRNA %>%
  group_by(Name,Sample,Location,Replicate2,Tissue) %>%
  summarise( percent = mean(percent)) ->
  methylationData.3.QC.mRNA.Name.Tissue.summary


methylationData.3.QC.mRNA.Name.Tissue.summary %>%
  mutate(methylationLevel = "All") %>%
  mutate(methylationLevel = replace(methylationLevel, percent < 90, "High")) %>%
  mutate(methylationLevel = replace(methylationLevel, percent < 75 , "Medium"))%>%
  mutate(methylationLevel = replace(methylationLevel, percent < 30 , "Low"))%>%
  mutate(methylationLevel = replace(methylationLevel, percent < 5 , "Nothing"))  ->
methylationData.3.QC.mRNA.Name.Tissue.summary      
  
methylationData.3.QC.mRNA.Name.Tissue.summary %>%
  group_by(Sample, Tissue, methylationLevel) %>%
  summarise(n = n())


methylationData.3.QC.mRNA.Name.Tissue.summary %>%
  filter(methylationLevel == "High" | methylationLevel == "Medium" ) %>%
  group_by(Name) %>%
  summarise(
    percent = mean(percent),
    n = n()
  )  %>%
  filter(n == 26 )  %>%
  filter( percent > 60)  ->
  mRNA.high.methylation
  
         
  methylationData.3.QC.mRNA.Name.Tissue.summary %>%ggplot(aes(x = Sample, y = percent, fill = Tissue)) +
           geom_violin()


```


###  Both analysis

####  Non-Parametric Test (Kruskal-Wallis)
```{r }
  
methylationData.3.QC %>%
  filter(location == "Both")  ->
  methylationData.3.QC.Both




methylationData.3.QC.Both %>%
  group_by(Name) %>%
  summarise(
    p_value = tryCatch({
      kruskal.test(percent ~ Tissue, data = cur_data())$p.value
    }, error = function(e) NA)
  ) %>%
  mutate(significant = "No") %>%
  mutate(significant = replace(significant, p_value < 0.0000001, "Yes")) ->
  kruskal_results.Both



# Filter significant results
kruskal_results.Both %>%
  filter(!is.na(p_value) & p_value < 0.0000000001)%>%
  arrange(p_value) ->
  kruskal_results.Both.sig

methylationData.3.QC.Both %>% 
  group_by(Name,Tissue ) %>%
  summarise(depth = mean(depth), percent = mean(percent))->
  methylationData.3.QC.Both.Name.Tissue.summary

methylationData.3.QC.Both.Name.Tissue.summary %>%
  group_by(Name) %>%
  summarise(max = max(percent),min = min(percent)) %>%
  inner_join(methylationData.3.QC.Both.Name.Tissue.summary) %>%
  filter(percent == max) ->
  methylationData.3.QC.Both.Name.Tissue.summary.max 

  methylationData.3.QC.Both.Name.Tissue.summary.max %>%
  inner_join(kruskal_results.Both.sig) ->
    methylationData.3.QC.Both.Name.Tissue.summary.max.sig


methylationData.3.QC.Both.Name.Tissue.summary.max.sig %>%
  inner_join(annotation.mRNA.df) -> 
  methylationData.3.QC.Both.Name.Tissue.summary.max.sig


kruskal_results.Both.sig %>% slice_head(n = 5)  -> 
  top5.both

methylationData.3.QC.Both   %>% 
  filter(Name %in%  top5.both$Name) %>%
  mutate(Name = factor(Name, levels = top5.both$Name)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = start, y = percent, color = Tissue)) +
  geom_point( size = 0.5, alpha = 0.4) + geom_smooth(se = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors) + ylim( c(0,100)) +
  labs(
    title = "Methylation across different Both",
    x = "Position",
    y = "Percent methylated"
  ) + facet_wrap("Name", scales = "free_x")   +
  theme_light() -> examples.Both.methylation
  

methylationData.3.QC.TE %>% 
  filter(TE_ID2 %in%  top5.te$TE_ID2) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = start, y = depth, color = Tissue)) +
  geom_point( size = 0.5, alpha = 0.4) + geom_smooth(se = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = colors) + ylim( c(0,40))  +
  labs(
    title = "Depth across different TEs (top 5 significant)",
    x = "Position in TE",
    y = "Depth"
  ) + facet_wrap(c("TE_ID2","TEclass"),nrow = 1, scales = "free_x")   +
  theme_light()  -> examples.depth





```


### Compare TE and mRNA
```{r }



# Place the TEs on the chromosomes.
methylationData.3.QC.TE.summary %>%
  inner_join(TEdf.long) -> methylationData.3.QC.TE.summary.location

# Keep only the long chromosomes
methylationData.3.QC.TE.summary.location %>%
  group_by(seqid) %>%
  summarise(n = n()) %>%
  filter(n > 50) %>%
  select(seqid)->
  chrs
  
chrs2 = chrs[1:11,]


# Rename so that mRNA and TE can be joined
methylationData.3.QC.TE.summary.location %>%
  select(Tissue, mean,  seqid, start) %>%
  mutate(type = "TE") ->
  ME.TE.location

methylationData.3.QC.mRNA.Name.Tissue.summary  %>%
  inner_join(annotation.mRNA.df) %>%
  filter(seqid %in% chrs2$seqid ) %>%
  select(Tissue, percent,  seqid, start) %>%
  dplyr::rename(mean = "percent") %>%
  mutate(type = "mRNA") ->
  ME.mRNA.location

bind_rows(ME.TE.location,ME.mRNA.location)->
  ME.TE.mRNA.location

ME.mRNA.location%>%
  filter(seqid %in% chrs2$seqid) %>%
  ggplot(aes(start,y =mean , color = Tissue)) + geom_point(size = 0.1) +
  facet_grid(Tissue~seqid) +
    theme_minimal()+
    scale_color_manual(values = colors) + ggtitle("mRNA methylation level") -> plot3

ME.TE.location %>%
  filter(seqid %in% chrs2$seqid) %>%
  ggplot(aes(start,y =mean , color = Tissue)) + geom_point(size = 0.1) +
  facet_grid(Tissue~seqid) +
    theme_minimal()+
    scale_color_manual(values = colors)+ ggtitle("TE methylation level")   -> plot1

ME.TE.mRNA.location %>% inner_join(TEdf.long) %>%
  filter(TEclass== "Gypsy") %>%
  filter(seqid %in% chrs2$seqid) %>%
  ggplot(aes(start,y =mean , color = type)) + geom_point(size = 0.1) +
  facet_grid(TEclass~seqid) +
    theme_minimal() ->plot2

ME.TE.mRNA.location %>% inner_join(TEdf.long) %>%
  filter(mean > 0.24) %>%
  filter(TEclass== "Gypsy") %>%
  filter(seqid %in% chrs2$seqid[1:3]) %>%
  ggplot(aes(start, color = type)) + geom_density(size = 0.5,bw = 50000) +
  facet_grid(TEclass~seqid) +
    theme_minimal() ->plot4

ME.TE.mRNA.location %>% inner_join(TEdf.long) %>%
  filter(mean < 0.24) %>%
  filter(TEclass== "Gypsy") %>%
  filter(seqid %in% chrs2$seqid) %>%
  ggplot(aes(start, color = type)) + geom_density(size = 0.5,bw = 50000) +
  facet_grid(TEclass~seqid) +
    theme_minimal() ->plot5

annotation.mRNA.df %>%
  filter(seqid %in% chrs2$seqid[1:3]) %>%
  ggplot(aes(start)) + geom_density(size = 0.3,bw = 50000) +
  facet_grid(.~seqid) +
    theme_minimal() -> plot6


plot3+plot5+plot4+plot1+ plot_layout(heights = c(2,1,1,2))
ggsave("../../results/meDNA/TE/TE.mRNA.location.pdf", width = 30, height = 10)

ME.TE.mRNA.location %>%
  filter(seqid %in% chrs2$seqid[1:3]) %>%
  ggplot(aes(start,y =mean , color = type)) + geom_point(size = 0.1) +
  facet_grid(Tissue~seqid) +
    theme_minimal()+ ggtitle(" Methylation level")  -> plot6


plot5+plot4+plot6+ plot_layout(heights = c(1,1,2))


ME.TE.location %>%
  filter(seqid %in% chrs2$seqid[11]) %>%
  ggplot(aes(start,y =mean , color = Tissue)) + geom_point(size = 0.1) +
  facet_grid(Tissue~seqid) +
    theme_minimal()+
    scale_color_manual(values = colors)+ ggtitle("TE methylation level")   -> plot1


 
  
  
  

```

```{r}

GOclass_counts <- kruskal_results.mRNA %>%
  inner_join(annotation.mRNA.GO.df) %>%
  group_by(GO, significant) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = significant, values_from = count, values_fill = 0) %>%
  rename(No = "No", Yes = "Yes") %>%
  mutate(ratio = No/Yes) %>%
  mutate(totalYes = sum(Yes)) %>%
  mutate(totalNo = sum(No)) %>%
  mutate(average =sum(Yes)/sum(No) )


GOclass_stats <- GOclass_counts %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    p_value = fisher.test(matrix(c(No, Yes, 8997, 29830), nrow = 2))$p.value
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>% arrange(-ratio) %>%
  mutate(ratio = Yes/No) %>%
  filter(p_value < 0.00000001) %>%
  arrange(p_value)



```

```{r}

methylationData.3.QC.TE %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Tissue, fill = methylationLevel ))+ geom_bar(position = "fill") +  # Replace with your desired geom
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 70, hjust = 1)) + facet_wrap("TEclass")


ggsave("../../results/meDNA/TE/MethylationDistribution.TEclass.pdf")





methylationData.3.QC.TE %>%ungroup() %>% 
  group_by(TE_ID2,Tissue) %>%
  filter(!is.na(percent)) %>%
  summarise(percent = mean(percent)) %>%
  pivot_wider(values_from = "percent",names_from = "Tissue") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = spore, y = lamella)) + geom_point(size = 0.1)+ geom_smooth(method = "lm") +geom_density_2d_filled(alpha = 0.)

  

methylationData.3.QC.TE %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::count(TE_ID2, Tissue) 

methylationData.3.QC.TE %>%
  summarise(has_na = any(is.na(percent)))

methylationData.3.QC.TE %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(TE_ID2, Tissue) %>%
  summarise(group_size = n())

```

```{r}



#methylationData.3 = read_csv("../../data/meDNA/methylationData.raw.annotated.csv")


methylationData.3.QC %>%
  filter(depth>10)%>% 
  ggplot(aes( x =log2(percent+1),
              color = Tissue,
              linetype = as.factor(Replicate))) +
  geom_density() +
  facet_grid(Location~location)





methylationData.3.wide %>% column_to_rownames(var = "posID") -> 
  methylationData.3.wide

```

#### Coding gene analysis
```{r }

methylationData.3.QC %>%
  filter(location == "GeneBody")->
  MD.mRNA.QC


samples = MD.mRNA.QC %>% ungroup() %>% distinct(Sample)

mRNA.data = list()

for(i in 1:nrow(samples)){
  MD.mRNA.QC %>%
    filter(Sample == samples$Sample[[i]]) ->
    MD.mRNA.QC.sample
  MD.mRNA.QC.sample%>%
  group_by(Name) %>%
  summarise(depth = mean(depth), percent = mean(percent)) %>%
    mutate(Sample = samples$Sample[[i]]) ->
  MD.mRNA.QC.sample.summary
  mRNA.data[[samples$Sample[[i]]]] = MD.mRNA.QC.sample.summary
}

MD.mRNA.summary = bind_rows(mRNA.data)


MD.mRNA.summary %>%
  group_by(Sample) %>%
  summarise(n = n())


MD.mRNA.summary %>%
  group_by(Name) %>%
  summarise(n = n()) %>%
  filter(n == 26) %>% 
  inner_join(MD.mRNA.summary) ->
  MD.mRNA.summary.QC


MD.mRNA.summary.QC %>% inner_join(samples.ring.methyl.df) -> 
  MD.mRNA.summary.QC

MD.mRNA.summary.QC %>% group_by(Name,Tissue ) %>%
  summarise(mean = mean(percent) , sd =sd(percent) ) ->
  MD.mRNA.summary.QC.summary

MD.mRNA.summary.QC.summary %>% group_by(Name) %>%
  summarise(mean = mean(mean) , sd =sd(mean) ) %>%
  arrange(-sd)


MD.mRNA.summary.QC.summary %>% select(Name,Tissue,mean) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "Tissue",values_from = "mean") ->
  MD.mRNA.summary.QC.wide

ggplot(MD.mRNA.summary.QC.wide, aes(x = lamella, y = stipe)) + 
  geom_point()


```
